title: user — retention windows
description: User + Profile follow a two-stage lifecycle: soft-delete moves the row into a hold window; hard-delete purges after the window expires. TenantMember follows the parent User. The compliance floor for the hold window is set by GDPR Art. 5(1)(e) storage limitation — default 30 days, tenant may extend up to 90 days.

cold.days: user.privacy.erasure_hold_days (default 30, up to 90 per tenant setting)
cold.state: soft-deleted (deleted_at set); hidden from every non-admin query; readable by admins via `?include_trashed=true`
soft-deleted; admin can restore within the window.

purge.trigger: deleted_at + 30 days past OR parent User hard-delete OR parent Tenant erasure

cold.days: up to 7 years per compliance tier

purge.action: audit rows OUTLIVE their User — that's the compliance signal. Retention is set by `audit::config.retention_days` per tier, clamped up by the compliance floor.
